'''Genogri''' was the leader of the warlike [[Wind Raiders/Legends|Wind Raider]] tribe of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] on [[Taloraan/Legends|Taloraan]].

==Biography==
Before he assumed chieftainship, the Wind Raiders were a peaceful people, but Genogri was ambitious and power hungry and transformed his tribe onto a band of warriors. He did not care much for peaceful negotiations, tending to prefer violent solutions to all conflicts.

He possessed a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] pistol that he had looted from a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operative whom he had betrayed and killed. He was later tricked by other Rebels who acquired the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of the murdered operative—also in Genogri's possession. He had test fired the blaster a couple of times, but did not really know how the weapon worked.

==Appearances==
